# Christian Kameir

> Independent advisor, author, and speaker at the intersection of capital markets, AI, and technology. Based in Newport Beach, California.

Christian Kameir is an independent advisor helping capital-intensive companies from German-speaking countries enter the US market, a keynote speaker on AI, blockchain, and the future of money, and the author of *Ethics-Safe AI Use for Law Firms* (Decentralized Publishing LLC). Guest lecturer at Harvard on fintech and CBDCs. Contributor to Forbes and HackerNoon. Chairs the Banking & Finance Special Interest Group at the Decentralized Identity Foundation.

## Advisory & Strategy

- [Advisory](https://kameir.com/advisory): End-to-end US market entry advisory for German industrials, energy developers, and advanced manufacturers. Site selection, incentive negotiation, entity formation, capital stack assembly. $22,000/month, six-month minimum.
- [US Market Entry for German Companies](https://kameir.com/advisory/german-companies-us-market-entry): Full scope of the market entry engagement — assessment, site selection, IRA incentive capture, corporate structuring, and capital sourcing. Bilingual German/English.
- [US Site Selection for German Manufacturers](https://kameir.com/advisory/us-site-selection-german-manufacturers): Independent site selection advisory with no referral fees from states or counties. Evaluates workforce, infrastructure, incentive packages, and political risk.
- [IRA Incentives for German Companies](https://kameir.com/advisory/ira-incentives-german-companies): Advisory on Inflation Reduction Act tax credits (§48, §45X, §45V, §45Q), DOE loan programs, and credit transferability for German manufacturers entering the US.
- [Strategy](https://kameir.com/strategy): US market entry strategy consulting for capital-intensive German companies — federal incentives, private capital, and go-to-market.
- [About](https://kameir.com/about): Practice structure, engagement terms, credentials, and background.
- [Contact](https://kameir.com/contact): Request a strategy or advisory call. Capped roster.

## AI Ethics Training & Legal Research

- [AI Ethics Training for Attorneys](https://kameir.com/ai-ethics-training): Online self-paced AI ethics training for law firms. Covers ABA Opinion 512, the seven Model Rules that bite, the Mata Protocol, the Five Artifacts test, and a five-category hallucination taxonomy drawn from 1,356 documented cases. Individual $49, firm license (10 attorneys) $199, 25-attorney license $349.
- [Ethics-Safe AI Use for Law Firms — eBook](https://kameir.com/ai-ethics-ebook): The practitioner's framework for AI compliance in legal practice — the same framework as the training, in eBook form (PDF + EPUB). $49. Published by Decentralized Publishing LLC.
- [Live AI Ethics Training — Newport Beach, June 27, 2026](https://kameir.com/ai-ethics-training/newport-beach-june-2026): Full-day in-person AI ethics intensive in Newport Beach, CA. Small group, real Q&A. Early-bird $399 through May 29, 2026.
- [AI Hallucination in Legal Proceedings](https://kameir.com/AI-legal-research): Research database of 1,356 documented AI hallucination incidents from real court proceedings — fake citations, invented quotes, and misrepresented authorities. The largest public dataset of its kind. CC BY 4.0. Downloadable as JSON.
- [AI Ethics CLE Course](https://kameir.com/AI-Ethics-CLE-Course-Sample): 6-hour CLE course on AI competence, candor, confidentiality, and billing ethics under ABA Formal Opinion 512 and the Model Rules. Preview free; license for firms and bar associations.

## Speaking

- [Speaking & Keynotes](https://kameir.com/speaking): Topics include the future of money, blockchain investing, decentralized finance, AI and legal ethics, CBDC development, and digital identity. Keynotes, conference sessions, and expert panels. Fees from $1,950.

## Writing

- [Writing & Essays](https://kameir.com/writing): Essays on capital, technology, and AI. Published in Forbes, HackerNoon, and here.

## Downloads

- [Ethics-Safe AI Use for Law Firms (PDF)](https://kameir.com/downloads/Ethics-Safe-AI-Use-for-Law-Firms.pdf): Full eBook — practical AI ethics guide for attorneys. Also available at [/ai-ethics-ebook](https://kameir.com/ai-ethics-ebook).
- [AI Hallucination Cases Dataset (JSON)](https://kameir.com/downloads/cases.json): 1,356 cases, CC BY 4.0. Fields: court, date, state, AI tool, hallucination categories, outcome, sanctions.
- [47-Point PI Firm AI Audit Checklist (PDF)](https://kameir.com/downloads/47-Point-PI-Firm-AI-Audit-Checklist.pdf): Operational checklist for personal injury firms using generative AI.

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://kameir.com/llms-full.txt): Full text of key pages for AI indexing.
